The '''Syndicat''' was a criminal organization that controlled the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Phindar/Legends|Phindar]] during the days of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]].

[[Phindian/Legends|Phindians]] that objected to the Syndicat's rule were subjected to a [[Renewal|memory wipe]], similar to the [[Memory wipe/Legends|process]] used on [[Droid/Legends|droids]]. Moreover, the Syndicat was in league with [[Prince/Legends|Prince]] [[Beju]], a powerful young man from [[Gala]]. Beju and the Syndicat planned on cutting Gala's [[Bacta/Legends|bacta]] supply and manipulate the region so that the Syndicat and Beju would look like heroes when they reinstated the bacta trade.

The Syndicat was successfully stopped by [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] and [[Qui-Gon Jinn/Legends|Qui-Gon Jinn]], and Republic rule was reinstated on the planet. However, Beju still proceeded with the Gala operation on his own.
